title: Kerala HC permits two transgender persons to continue hormone replacement therapy amid challenge to new law
description: The Kerala High Court on Friday allowed two transgender persons to continue hormone replacement therapy after it was alleged that hospitals have stopped their treatment following the enactment of Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026.The Court was hearing two petitions challenging the recently enacted law.Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas said that if such treatment is brought to an abrupt stop for a person, there could be very "absurd results" for them."This should have been
